name: Watchtower Base
description: A narrow stone chamber at the base of the watchtower. A spiral stair climbs to the second floor above.
ambient: Dust drifts in pale shafts of light from arrow slits.
The stair groans softly under its own weight.

interaction_rules.text: You close your eyes and murmur a quiet prayer. For a heartbeat, the room feels still enough to listen.
Your voice drifts through the area and fades into the distance. No one applauds, but it lifts your spirits.
